title: eminium lehmannii
intro: Eminium lehmannii, also known as the Lehmann's eminium or Lehmann's orchid, is a type of flowering plant that belongs to the Arum family. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antispasmodic effects. The health benefits of Eminium lehmannii include its potential to alleviate respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to reduce pain and inflammation. The herbal preparations of Eminium lehmannii can be found in various forms, including infusions, decoctions, and tinctures, which are used to treat various health conditions.
